title: FLUTE: Figurative Language Understanding through Textual Explanations
description: Figurative language understanding via NLI. Annotators classify figurative sentences (sarcasm, simile, metaphor, idiom) and provide textual explanations of the figurative meaning. The task combines natural language inference with fine-grained figurative language type classification.
